title: Comment from Berger, Mitchell, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: Dear Mr. Lipinski: I write to briefly comment on the above proposed rule. I suggest in the final rule ASTP/ONC note the complexities of electronic health record (EHR) adoption in the behavioral health sector and maintain the emergency access (§170.315(d)(6)) and accounting of disclosures certification criteria (§170.315(d)(11)). Thank you for considering this input which represents solely my personal views and not those of any other individual(s) nor an agency/ organization. Full comment attached. Sincerely, Mitchell Berger
